calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-25-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Chew Lun Realty, Co., is present. Represented by Bernard Stalder.
Attorney David Foran appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jin Feng Xie is present.
Attorney Jin Jack Shim representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquist, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of OCT-29-2012 is vacated.
